metadata.overview: Reports Ocean.xyz mining pool account data: hashrate, workers, balances and revenue. Read-only — pool state is polled over HTTPS, no device writes.

telemetry.name: hashrate
telemetry.description: Total pool-side hashrate across configured accounts (60s window).

telemetry.name: workers_online
telemetry.description: Workers currently known to the pool.

telemetry.name: balance
telemetry.description: Unsettled + settled account balance across accounts.

telemetry.name: estimated_earnings
telemetry.description: Estimated income for the current day across accounts.

troubleshooting: If alert.pool_unreachable, verify the apiUrl and outbound HTTPS connectivity.
If alert.hashrate_low, cross-check the fleet's own hashrate before escalating.
